---
title: "Analisis input"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-26"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
packages <- c("arules", "arulesViz", "dplyr", "tidyr",
              "ggplot2", "stringr", "RColorBrewer")
for (pkg in packages) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) install.packages(pkg)
  library(pkg, character.only = TRUE)
}
```

```{r}
tgl_min  <- as.Date("2024-06-08")
tgl_max  <- as.Date("2026-05-25")
PHI      <- 3
MIN_CONF <- 0.5
MIN_LIFT <- 1.0

transaksi_raw <- list(
  T1  = c("Bahan Pokok","Sayuran","Susu & Olahan Susu","Minuman","Mie Instan"),
  T2  = c("Buah","Snack","Sayuran","Susu & Olahan Susu","Bahan Pokok","Bumbu & Rempah","Ikan & Seafood"),
  T3  = c("Makanan Instan","Buah","Bumbu & Rempah"),
  T4  = c("Daging & Olahan","Snack","Bahan Pokok"),
  T5  = c("Perawatan Tubuh","Sayuran"),
  T6  = c("Ikan & Seafood","Bumbu & Rempah","Bahan Pokok","Sayuran"),
  T7  = c("Susu & Olahan Susu","Minuman","Perawatan Tubuh","Frozen Food","Kebersihan Rumah"),
  T8  = c("Buah","Sayuran"),
  T9  = c("Kantong & Tas","Frozen Food","Makanan Instan","Susu & Olahan Susu","Roti","Sayuran"),
  T10 = c("Minuman","Snack","Perawatan Tubuh","Bahan Pokok","Sayuran","Kantong & Tas"),
  T11 = c("Susu & Olahan Susu","Snack"),
  T12 = c("Perawatan Tubuh","Kantong & Tas"),
  T13 = c("Kebersihan Rumah","Minuman","Bahan Pokok","Buah","Daging & Olahan",
          "Bumbu & Rempah","Mie Instan","Ikan & Seafood"),
  T14 = c("Perawatan Tubuh","Kantong & Tas"),
  T15 = c("Minuman","Perawatan Tubuh"),
  T16 = c("Perawatan Tubuh","Kebersihan Rumah"),
  T17 = c("Snack","Bahan Pokok"),
  T18 = c("Bahan Pokok"),
  T19 = c("Kantong & Tas","Bumbu & Rempah","Snack"),
  T20 = c("Frozen Food","Minuman","Kebersihan Rumah","Perawatan Tubuh","Kantong & Tas"),
  T21 = c("Bahan Pokok","Bumbu & Rempah","Minuman"),
  T22 = c("Snack","Susu & Olahan Susu","Minuman","Kantong & Tas"),
  T23 = c("Minuman"),
  T24 = c("Minuman","Snack","Daging & Olahan","Susu & Olahan Susu"),
  T25 = c("Kebersihan Rumah","Kantong & Tas","Makanan Instan","Snack","Minuman","Susu & Olahan Susu"),
  T26 = c("Daging & Olahan"),
  T27 = c("Kebersihan Rumah","Perawatan Tubuh","Bahan Pokok","Mie Instan"),
  T28 = c("Minuman"),
  T29 = c("Mie Instan","Snack","Roti","Susu & Olahan Susu"),
  T30 = c("Daging & Olahan","Snack"),
  T31 = c("Snack","Bumbu & Rempah","Daging & Olahan","Mie Instan")
)

transaksi_kategori <- lapply(transaksi_raw, unique)
N       <- length(transaksi_kategori)
MIN_SUP <- PHI / N
```

```{r}
hitung_support_count <- function(itemset, trans_list) {
  sum(sapply(trans_list, function(t) all(itemset %in% t)))
}

fmt_itemset <- function(items) {
  paste0("{", paste(sort(items), collapse = ", "), "}")
}

generate_kandidat <- function(freq_sets) {
  freq_sets <- lapply(freq_sets, sort)
  n         <- length(freq_sets)
  if (n < 2) return(list())
  kandidat <- list()
  for (i in seq_len(n - 1)) {
    for (j in seq(i + 1, n)) {
      a <- freq_sets[[i]]; b <- freq_sets[[j]]; k <- length(a)
      if (k == 1 || identical(a[seq_len(k - 1)], b[seq_len(k - 1)])) {
        kandidat <- c(kandidat, list(sort(union(a, b))))
      }
    }
  }
  kandidat[!duplicated(sapply(kandidat, paste, collapse = "|"))]
}
```

```{r}
semua_item <- sort(unique(unlist(transaksi_kategori)))

df_F1_all <- data.frame(
  item  = semua_item,
  count = sapply(semua_item, hitung_support_count, trans_list = transaksi_kategori),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
df_F1_all$support <- df_F1_all$count / N
df_F1_all         <- df_F1_all[order(-df_F1_all$count), ]


print(df_F1_all, row.names = FALSE)

F1_items <- df_F1_all$item[df_F1_all$count >= PHI]
F1_sets  <- as.list(F1_items)
```

```{r}
C2 <- combn(sort(F1_items), 2, simplify = FALSE)

df_C2 <- data.frame(
  itemset_str = sapply(C2, fmt_itemset),
  count       = sapply(C2, hitung_support_count, trans_list = transaksi_kategori),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
df_C2$support <- df_C2$count / N
df_C2         <- df_C2[order(-df_C2$count), ]


print(head(df_C2, 20), row.names = FALSE)

F2_idx  <- df_C2$count >= PHI
F2_str  <- df_C2$itemset_str[F2_idx]
F2_sets <- C2[match(F2_str, sapply(C2, fmt_itemset))]
```

```{r}
F3_sets <- list(); df_C3 <- data.frame(); F3_str <- character(0)

C3 <- generate_kandidat(F2_sets)
if (length(C3) > 0) {
  df_C3 <- data.frame(
    itemset_str = sapply(C3, fmt_itemset),
    count       = sapply(C3, hitung_support_count, trans_list = transaksi_kategori),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  df_C3$support <- df_C3$count / N
  df_C3         <- df_C3[order(-df_C3$count), ]
  

  print(df_C3, row.names = FALSE)
  
  F3_idx  <- df_C3$count >= PHI
  F3_str  <- df_C3$itemset_str[F3_idx]
  F3_sets <- C3[match(F3_str, sapply(C3, fmt_itemset))]
}
```

```{r}
F4_sets <- list()

if (length(F3_sets) > 0) {
  C4 <- generate_kandidat(F3_sets)
  if (length(C4) > 0) {
    df_C4 <- data.frame(
      itemset_str = sapply(C4, fmt_itemset),
      count       = sapply(C4, hitung_support_count, trans_list = transaksi_kategori),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    df_C4$support <- df_C4$count / N
    df_C4         <- df_C4[order(-df_C4$count), ]
    
       
    print(df_C4, row.names = FALSE)
    
    F4_idx  <- df_C4$count >= PHI
    F4_sets <- C4[match(df_C4$itemset_str[F4_idx], sapply(C4, fmt_itemset))]
  }
}
```

```{r}
all_freq_sets <- c(F2_sets, F3_sets, F4_sets)
all_freq_sets <- all_freq_sets[!sapply(all_freq_sets, is.null)]

rules_list <- list()

for (fset in all_freq_sets) {
  fset         <- sort(fset)
  count_AB     <- hitung_support_count(fset, transaksi_kategori)
  support_AB   <- count_AB / N
  
  for (consequent in fset) {
    antecedent  <- setdiff(fset, consequent)
    count_A     <- hitung_support_count(antecedent, transaksi_kategori)
    if (count_A == 0) next
    confidence  <- count_AB / count_A
    support_B   <- hitung_support_count(consequent, transaksi_kategori) / N
    lift        <- confidence / support_B
    
    if (confidence >= MIN_CONF && lift >= MIN_LIFT) {
      rules_list <- c(rules_list, list(list(
        antecedent = fmt_itemset(antecedent),
        consequent = fmt_itemset(consequent),
        supp_count = count_AB,
        support    = support_AB,
        conf_count = count_A,
        confidence = confidence,
        lift       = lift
      )))
    }
  }
}

if (length(rules_list) > 0) {
  df_rules_manual <- data.frame(
    antecedent = sapply(rules_list, `[[`, "antecedent"),
    consequent = sapply(rules_list, `[[`, "consequent"),
    supp_count = sapply(rules_list, `[[`, "supp_count"),
    support    = round(sapply(rules_list, `[[`, "support"), 4),
    conf_count = sapply(rules_list, `[[`, "conf_count"),
    confidence = round(sapply(rules_list, `[[`, "confidence"), 4),
    lift       = round(sapply(rules_list, `[[`, "lift"), 4),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  df_rules_manual <- df_rules_manual[order(-df_rules_manual$lift,
                                           -df_rules_manual$confidence), ]
  rownames(df_rules_manual) <- NULL


  print(df_rules_manual)
} else {
  df_rules_manual <- data.frame()
}
```

```{r}
trans_arules <- as(transaksi_kategori, "transactions")

rules_apr <- apriori(
  trans_arules,
  parameter = list(supp = MIN_SUP, conf = MIN_CONF, minlen = 2, maxlen = 10),
  control   = list(verbose = FALSE)
)
rules_apr <- rules_apr[quality(rules_apr)$lift >= MIN_LIFT]

if (length(rules_apr) > 0) {

  inspect(head(sort(rules_apr, by = "lift"), 10))
}
```

```{r}
fi_eclat <- eclat(
  trans_arules,
  parameter = list(supp = MIN_SUP, minlen = 2, maxlen = 10),
  control   = list(verbose = FALSE)
)

rules_fpg <- NULL
if (length(fi_eclat) > 0) {
  rules_fpg <- ruleInduction(fi_eclat, trans_arules, confidence = MIN_CONF)
  rules_fpg <- rules_fpg[quality(rules_fpg)$lift >= MIN_LIFT]

  if (length(rules_fpg) > 0) {

    inspect(head(sort(rules_fpg, by = "lift"), 10))
  }
}
```

```{r}
n_manual <- nrow(df_rules_manual)
n_apr    <- length(rules_apr)
n_fpg    <- if (!is.null(rules_fpg)) length(rules_fpg) else 0

tabel_perbandingan <- data.frame(
  Metode  = c("Apriori Manual", "Apriori (arules)", "FP-Growth"),
  N_Rules = c(n_manual, n_apr, n_fpg)
)

print(tabel_perbandingan, row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
pal <- RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(8, "Set2")

png("viz_01_frekuensi_kategori.png", width = 1000, height = 600, res = 120)
itemFrequencyPlot(
  trans_arules, topN = 16, type = "absolute", col = pal[1],
  main = sprintf("Frekuensi Kategori per Transaksi\n(%s s/d %s)", tgl_min, tgl_max),
  ylab = "Frekuensi (jumlah transaksi)", xlab = "",
  cex.names = 0.80, las = 2
)
dev.off()

if (length(rules_apr) > 0) {
  top_apr <- head(sort(rules_apr, by = "lift"), 20)
  png("viz_02_graph_apriori.png", width = 1000, height = 900, res = 120)
  plot(top_apr, method = "graph", engine = "igraph")
  dev.off()
}

if (!is.null(rules_fpg) && length(rules_fpg) > 0) {
  top_fpg <- head(sort(rules_fpg, by = "lift"), 20)
  png("viz_03_graph_fpgrowth.png", width = 1000, height = 900, res = 120)
  plot(top_fpg, method = "graph", engine = "igraph")
  dev.off()
}

png("viz_04_perbandingan_metode.png", width = 900, height = 500, res = 120)
print(
  ggplot(tabel_perbandingan, aes(x = Metode, y = N_Rules, fill = Metode)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.6) +
    geom_text(aes(label = N_Rules), vjust = -0.4, size = 4, fontface = "bold") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(
      "Apriori Manual"   = pal[1],
      "Apriori (arules)" = pal[3],
      "FP-Growth"        = pal[4]
    )) +
    labs(
      title    = "Perbandingan Jumlah Rules — 3 Metode",
      subtitle = sprintf("Periode: %s s/d %s  |  phi=%d  |  min_conf=%.0f%%  |  min_lift=%.1f",
                         tgl_min, tgl_max, PHI, MIN_CONF * 100, MIN_LIFT),
      x = "Metode", y = "Jumlah Rules"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"), legend.position = "none")
)
dev.off()


if (n_manual > 0) {
  write.csv(df_rules_manual, "rules_apriori_manual.csv", row.names = FALSE)
}
if (length(rules_apr) > 0) {
  write.csv(
    as(rules_apr, "data.frame") |> arrange(desc(lift)),
    "rules_apriori_arules.csv", row.names = FALSE
  )
}
if (!is.null(rules_fpg) && length(rules_fpg) > 0) {
  write.csv(
    as(rules_fpg, "data.frame") |> arrange(desc(lift)),
    "rules_fpgrowth.csv", row.names = FALSE
  )
}
```
